backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Portfolio, MonthlySnapshot, UserProfile) and CRUD endpoints for portfolios, user profiles, and monthly snapshots with role-based access control via AccessControl mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a clean rebuild/redeploy task to specific frontend files, components, and test IDs to confirm the app loads successfully after deployment.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing each file's purpose, used as build planning documentation for the frontend.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Portfolio Management' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state via Internet Identity, conditionally rendering LoginPage, ProfileSetupPage, or the main Dashboard wrapped in Layout.
frontend/src/components/AssetAllocationC: Recharts donut pie chart component that computes and visualizes asset allocation (12 categories including RSU/ESOP and precious metals) from a MonthlySnapshot, with loading skeleton and custom tooltip.
frontend/src/components/AssetGrowthChart: Responsive grid of Recharts LineChart cards showing historical monthly value trends per asset class, with growth/decline badges and compact INR formatting.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the app shell with a sticky Header component that handles Internet Identity login/logout via a dropdown menu, and a Layout wrapper that renders children within a centered container.
A popover-based month/year picker component that allows selecting a month within a bounded year range, disabling future months.
frontend/src/components/PortfolioForm.ts: A form component for entering and saving monthly portfolio snapshots, supporting asset categories like equity, gold, silver, RSU, ESOP, and liabilities, with mock rate auto-fetch functionality.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCards.tsx: Displays three summary cards (Total Assets, Total Liabilities, Net Worth) computed from a monthly snapshot, with loading skeleton support.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profile, portfolio, dashboard, and monthly snapshot data via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens including colors, chart palette, and sidebar variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page that displays net worth, asset allocation chart, growth charts, and a portfolio form for a user-selected month, driven by monthly snapshot data.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that presents the WealthTrack branding, feature highlights, and an Internet Identity login button.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: One-time profile setup page that collects the user's name and saves it via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation before redirecting to the dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/formatCurrency.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers as Indian Rupees in full (en-IN locale) and compact notation (K/L/Cr suffixes).
frontend/src/utils/mockRateFetcher.ts: Provides mock async functions that return simulated INR prices for US stocks (hash-based), gold (₹8,000–₹9,500/g), and silver (₹90–₹110/g) with artificial network delays.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and cleaning URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color tokens (using oklch CSS variables), typography, border radius, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 13) describing a monthly portfolio tracker app's features, architecture, known issues, and existing feature inventory for build planning.
